suggestedResponse: Please dispatch nearest available staff to investigate immediately.

Please dispatch emergency medical personnel to zone "gate-a" immediately to assess the situation. Given the current density of 30 people in this area, ensure the path remains clear for responders to access the individual safely.

Dispatch medical personnel to Gate A immediately to assess the situation and provide necessary aid. Ensure nearby stadium staff keep the immediate area clear to facilitate access for responders and maintain crowd flow.
